## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit message(s) (`type(scope): subject`)
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] New behavior has tests (TDD: failing test first)
- [ ] No secrets committed; no unguarded debug output
- [ ] `protocol.py` wire format unchanged, or change documented in `PROTOCOL.md`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or API changed
